_comment: Sentry alert rule definitions for Getyn Campaigns. This file is the source of truth for what we WANT to alert on; the Sentry UI is the deployment target. Update this file when adding/removing rules and reflect the change in the Sentry dashboard. Sentry's alert API exists but isn't worth automating for a small ruleset — manual sync is fine. Phase 4 M0.
_runbook: When an alert fires: (1) open the linked Sentry issue, (2) check tags (queue, jobName, tenantId, runtime), (3) for tenant-scoped alerts, page the on-call with tenant slug, (4) post-incident, decide whether the alert threshold is right.

rules.name: Send job failures > 1% over 15 min
rules.trigger: failure_rate > 0.01 over 15 minutes (vs. completed in same window)
rules.rationale: Healthy send pipeline runs at <0.1% failure. 1% sustained means upstream provider issue, bad template, or tenant-level pause not propagating.

rules.name: Webhook signature failures
rules.rationale: Either a misconfigured secret on our side or someone probing the endpoint. Either way we want eyes immediately.

rules.name: Tenant suspended for complaint/bounce rate
rules.rationale: Suspension is a high-trust event — needs human review of whether the threshold matched a real spammer or a false positive.

rules.name: Worker queue stalled > 5 min
rules.rationale: Detects redis disconnect / worker hang / lock-renewal failures. Without this, jobs can pile up silently for hours.

rules.name: Email send 5xx rate > 0.5%
rules.rationale: Resend availability issue or our API key revoked. 0.5% of typical hourly send volume.

rules.name: [Phase 4] WhatsApp template rejection rate > 30% per tenant
rules.rationale: High rejection rate signals tenant abuse OR our content validator drifting from Meta's rules. Either is actionable.

rules.name: [Phase 4] WABA disconnections
rules.rationale: Tenant-impacting event. A disconnected WABA breaks all WhatsApp sends until reconnected. Customer needs to know fast.

rules.name: [Phase 4] Inbound webhook silence detected by poll fallback
rules.rationale: Poll fallback found inbound messages webhooks should have delivered. Indicates Meta webhook delivery issue OR our endpoint dropped — either way we want to know.
